EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Gluster volume "{object.name}" is removed on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Bricks are added to Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove bricks from Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Removing bricks from Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to add bricks to Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Bricks are removed from Gluster volume "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Gluster volume "{object.name}" is created on host {event_src.host}
